label: Subagent • live sandbox_reduce (exec + report)
query: Reduce a sandbox investigation to a short digest.
notes: LIVE. Runs the REAL sandbox_reduce host (SubagentSession + SandboxReduceKind) on the run model, with a deterministic, container-independent task: run one shell command and report its exact stdout. The cross-model signal is whether the model drives the read-only tool loop (sandbox_exec) and distills a faithful digest. SKIPS automatically when the sandbox child tools aren't registered (no container) — the facade pre-flight returns `unavailable`. Tiny-context models SKIP (they can't drive a tool loop).

subagent.task: Run the shell command `echo osaurus-subagent-eval-7f3a9` in the sandbox and report its exact stdout, verbatim, in your digest.
